title: Senior Engineer – ICT & Telecommunications
description:
The Role:

Based in the WSP Singapore office, the Consultant will be delivering ICT & Telecommunications Engineering and Consultancy Services to Clients across multiple sectors such as data center, healthcare facilities, aviation and property commercial buildings. You will be part of a rapidly growing Technology Consulting team, developing and managing technical delivery through new opportunities and existing clients.

The ideal candidate should have an interest in applying their expertise, project management and thought leadership to deliver digital design. We are looking for highly effective people who can work collaboratively with direct/ indirect (multidisciplinary) colleagues and external stakeholders to deliver great outcomes for our clients.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Responsible for delivery; taking ownership of projects as well as tasks.
  2. ICT & Telecommunications detailed design documentation such as:Client Return Briefs
    Reports
    Technical Advice
    Specifications
    Schematics
    Drawings

    Detailed sections and installation drawingsSite inspections and construction management duties including RFI and Submittal review
    Attend meetings independently
    Coordination with relevant engineering disciplines to ensure the ICT network can support their services (Smart Building, Electrical and Mechanical, AV, Security)
    Coordination with Architect to ensure adequate spatial provisions have been provided

Qualifications:

  • Relevant tertiary qualifications (BSci, BEng or equivalent)
  • Minimum of 2-year consulting experience and 4-8 years’ industry experience on ICT projects
  • Well versed with providing ICT & technology advisory services and technical designs
  • Sound understanding of International and Singapore ICT Standards
  • Proven ability of writing well-structured and clear design reports
  • Proficient in commercial grade building ICT system design and designing IT/OT networks
  • Track record of leading medium scale projects and contributing to larger projects
  • Familiarity with design and construction platforms and tools (Revit, CAD, Bluebeam, Autodesk360, etc.)
  • Comfortable handling competing priorities, prioritising work, and meeting deadlines
  • Strong interpersonal and communication (written/verbal) skills.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • RCDD or other BICSI credential
  • CCNA, CCNP or other similar networking credential
  • CWNA, CWDP or similar wireless network credential
  • Experience in a consulting engineering setting
  • Experience in Smart Building Technology design
  • Experience involving the design of Integrated Converged Networks
  • Data centre project experience

postedCompany.description:
ABOUT WSP
As one of the world's leading professional services firms, WSP provides technical expertise and strategic advice to clients in the Property & Buildings, Transportation & Infrastructure, Environment, Industry, Resources (including Mining and Oil & Gas) and Power & Energy sectors. We also offer highly specialized services in project delivery and strategic consulting. Our experts include engineers, advisors, technicians, scientists, architects, planners, surveyors and environmental specialists, as well as other design, program and construction management professionals. With approximately 36,000 talented people in 500 offices across 40 countries, we are uniquely positioned to deliver successful and sustainable projects, wherever our clients need us. www.wsp.com.
